options.name: --options-json
options.description:
(Default: ) The path to a .json file that
contains a serialized
SerializedAnalyzeCommandOptions object which can
specify both Analyze options and extra options.
Options specified explicitly override options
from this argument.

options.name: --source-code
options.description:
(Default: ) Path to a directory
containing files to scan or a single file to
scan

options.name: --output-file
options.description:
(Default: ) Filename for result file, uses
stdout if not set.

options.name: -r
options.description:
(Default: ) Comma separated list of paths to
rules files to use

options.name: --rule-ids
options.description:
(Default: ) Comma separated list of rule IDs to
limit analysis to

options.name: --ignore-rule-ids
options.description:
(Default: ) Comma separated list of rule IDs to
ignore

options.name: --languages
options.description:
(Default: ) Path to custom json formatted
Language file to specify languages, when
specified comments must also be specified

options.name: --comments
options.description:
(Default: ) Path to custom json formatted
Comments file to specify languages, when
specified languages must also be specified

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
(Default: %F:%L:%C:%l:%c [%S] %R %N) Format for
output text.

options.name: --file-format
options.description:
(Default: sarif) Format type for output.
[text|sarif|vs]

options.name: --severity
options.description:
(Default: Critical Important Moderate
BestPractice ManualReview) Comma-separated
Severities to match

options.name: --confidence
options.description:
(Default: High Medium) Comma-separated
Severities to match

options.name: --ignore-globs
options.description:
(Default: **/.git/** **/bin/**) Comma-separated
Globs for files to skip analyzing

options.name: --include-globs
options.description:
(Default: ) If set, files must match one of
these globs to be analyzed

options.name: --disable-supression
options.description: (Default: false) Disable comment suppressions

options.name: --disable-parallel
options.description: (Default: false) Disable parallel processing

options.name: --ignore-default-rules
options.description: (Default: false) Ignore default rules

options.name: --crawl-archives
options.description:
(Default: false) Analyze files contained inside
of archives

options.name: -E
options.description:
(Default: false) Use exit code for number of
issues. Negative on error.

options.name: --base-path
options.description:
(Default: ) Specify what path to root result
URIs in Sarif results with. When not set will
generate paths relative to the source directory
(or directory containing the source file
specified)

options.name: --absolute-path
options.description:
(Default: false) Output absolute paths
(overrides --base-path).

options.name: --skip-git-ignored-files
options.description:
(Default: false) Set to skip files which are
ignored by .gitignore. Requires git to be
installed.

options.name: --skip-excerpts
options.description:
(Default: false) Set to skip gathering excerpts
and samples to include in the report.

options.name: --console-verbosity
options.description:
(Default: Information) Console verbosity
[Verbose|Debug|Information|Warning|Error|Fatal]

options.name: --disable-console
options.description:
(Default: false) Disable console output of
logging messages.

options.name: --log-file-level
options.description:
(Default: Error) Log file level
[Verbose|Debug|Information|Warning|Error|Fatal]

options.name: --log-file-path
options.description: Log file path. If not set, will not log to file.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --source-code
options.description:
Path to the parent directory containing
the source code that was scanned to produce the
sarif.

options.name: --sarif-result
options.description:
Filename for the output sarif from
DevSkim Analyze.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Print information about files that would be changed
without changing them.

options.name: --all
options.description: Apply all fixes.

options.name: --files
options.description: Comma separated list of paths to apply fixes to

options.name: --rules
options.description: Comma separated list of rules to apply fixes for

options.name: --console-verbosity
options.description:
(Default: Information) Console verbosity
[Verbose|Debug|Information|Warning|Error|Fatal]

options.name: --disable-console
options.description:
(Default: false) Disable console output of logging
messages.

options.description:
(Default: Error) Log file level
[Verbose|Debug|Information|Warning|Error|Fatal]

options.name: --log-file-path
options.description: Log file path. If not set, will not log to file.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.

commands.name: suppress
commands.description: Suppress issues identified in a DevSkim Sarif

options.description:

the source code that was scanned to produce the
sarif.

options.name: --sarif-result
options.description:
Filename for the output sarif from
DevSkim Analyze.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Print information about files that would be changed
without changing them.

options.name: --all
options.description: Apply all ignore.

options.name: --files
options.description: Comma separated list of paths to apply ignore to

options.name: --rules
options.description: Comma separated list of rules to apply ignore for

options.name: --prefer-multiline
options.description:
(Default: false) Prefer using multi-line formatted
suppression comments

options.name: --duration
options.description:
(Default: 0) Optional duration for suppressions in
days from current system time

options.name: --languages
options.description:
Path to custom json formatted Language file to
specify languages, when specified comments must
also be specified

options.name: --comments
options.description:
Path to custom json formatted Comments file to
specify languages, when specified languages must
also be specified

options.name: --reviewer
options.description:
Set an optional reviewer name to be associated with
added suppressions
